final_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a sunny park scene viewed from slightly left of center, focusing on a man and his golden retriever standing on a patch of short green grass. The man, wearing a light blue button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers, stands upright with his hands relaxed at his sides. To his right, a golden retriever sits calmly, its long fur catching the sunlight. Behind them, a tree with light-colored bark and sparse green leaves rises from the left side of the frame. A wooden park bench with a slatted seat and backrest is partially visible behind the tree. Further back on the right side, another identical wooden bench sits near a tall lamppost with a classic design. The background features a blurred city skyline across a body of water, under a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds. The ground in the immediate foreground is covered in short green grass, which is now depicted as white snow, altering the texture and color but preserving the original positions and proportions of all objects. The lighting remains bright daylight from the upper left, casting soft shadows to the right of the subjects and trees. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level shot, facing the subject (man and dog) centered in the frame; Foreground: the man and his golden retriever are centered, standing on short green grass. The dog is seated slightly to the right of the man; Left side: a tree trunk with light bark texture, some green leaves, and a wooden park bench partially visible behind it; Right side: another wooden park bench further back, with a lamppost visible near it; Background: a blurred city skyline across a body of water, under a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds. Style reference: Dominant color palette: vibrant greens from the grass, light blue from the shirt and sky, tan from the pants and dog fur, and brown from the tree and benches; Surface materials: short green grass in the foreground, smooth tree bark, weathered wood for the benches, and a glossy finish on the lamppost; Left side: a tree trunk with light bark texture, some green leaves, and a wooden park bench partially visible behind it; Overall atmosphere: sunny, open, and serene outdoor park setting.

constraints: The man is wearing a light blue button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers.
The man is standing upright with his hands relaxed at his sides.
The golden retriever is seated calmly to the right of the man.
The dog's long fur is catching sunlight.
A tree with light-colored bark and sparse green leaves is on the left side of the frame.
A wooden park bench with a slatted seat and backrest is partially visible behind the tree.
Another identical wooden park bench is further back on the right side.
A tall lamppost with a classic design is near the second bench.
The background features a blurred city skyline across a body of water.
The sky is bright blue with scattered white clouds.
The ground in the immediate foreground is covered in short green grass, now depicted as white snow.
The lighting is bright daylight from the upper left, casting soft shadows to the right.
The camera viewpoint is eye-level, facing the man and dog centered in the frame.
The man and dog are centered in the foreground, standing on short green grass (now snow).
The tree trunk with light bark texture and some green leaves is on the left side.
The wooden park bench is partially visible behind the tree on the left.
The second wooden park bench is further back on the right side.
The lamppost is visible near the second bench on the right.
The overall atmosphere is sunny, open, and serene.
The dominant color palette includes vibrant greens, light blue, tan, and brown.
Surface materials include short green grass (now snow), smooth tree bark, weathered wood for benches, and a glossy finish on the lamppost.
